query:
ALTER TABLE niveis_cargo 
  ADD COLUMN funcao VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL AFTER cargo,
  ADD COLUMN salarioBase DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT NULL AFTER salarioMaximo,
  ADD COLUMN comissionado TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL AFTER salarioBase,
  ADD COLUMN cargoConfianca TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL AFTER comissionado,
  ADD COLUMN requisitosFormacao TEXT DEFAULT NULL AFTER cargoConfianca;
